Calm Balm

✓ In Stock

Ease tension and find your centre when emotions run high — lavender, rosemary and peppermint essential oils for grounding and calm. Apply to pulse points.

20ml Aluminium Tin — $12

Product Options

Ingredients

Coconut Oil (Cocos nucifera), Beeswax, Cocobutter (Cocos nucifera), Sweet Almond Oil (Prunus dulcis), Jojoba Oil (Simmondsia chinensis), Vitamin E Oil. Essential Oils: Lavender (Lavendula angustifolia), Rosemary (Rosmarinus officinalis), Peppermint (Mentha arvensis)

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Sleep Balm

✓ In Stock

Drift into a restful night's sleep — lavender and chamomile to ease the transition from day to night and support deep, restorative rest.

20ml Aluminium Tin — $12

Product Options

Ingredients

Coconut Oil (Cocos nucifera), Beeswax, Cocobutter (Cocos nucifera), Sweet Almond Oil (Prunus dulcis), Jojoba Oil (Simmondsia chinensis), Vitamin E Oil. Essential Oils: Lavender (Lavendula angustifolia), Chamomile (Matricaria chamomilla)

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
